testcase.name: Admin user Edit/Delete Employee
testcase.system-out: Given An Admin..............................................................passed When I can browse to the site...............................................passed Then Ableto Admin Dashboard page should display.............................passed When I can select the Action Edit...........................................passed Then I can edit employee details............................................passed And the data should change in the table.....................................passed When I click the Action X...................................................passed Then the employee should be deleted.........................................passed
